old_value: {"id":"smallhold-7igp","title":"Panic on multi-byte UTF-8 in OG description truncation","description":"In activitypub.rs line 417, the OG description is truncated with \u0026plain_text[..197]. This is byte-indexed slicing, which panics if byte 197 falls inside a multi-byte UTF-8 character (e.g., emoji, CJK, accented characters). Fix: use .chars().take(197).collect::\u003cString\u003e() or a char-boundary-aware truncation like the truncate_str() helper already defined in inbox.rs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:56.64227437Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:56.64227437Z","labels":["codereview"]}
